Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Business_Specialists.asp

# Human Resources Specialist Routing

## Specialist resource summary
Erica McGruder is listed for HR support. Use when the client needs help thinking through hiring systems, HR basics, employee/contractor workflow questions, onboarding, or people-management processes. Guardrail: do not make final worker classification or employment-law decisions.

## BOSS routing use
Use this file when a user has moved past a vague business idea and needs targeted specialist support. If the user is not already an SBDC client, route first to local SBDC advising and ask the advisor to coordinate specialist access.

## Handoff note
Include the specific business problem, documents available, and desired outcome in the SBDC handoff summary.
